name: Reggie Berry Golf LLC
about: Reggie Berry Golf LLC is an indoor golf venue that offers a secure checkout process through Square. The establishment accepts various payment methods including Apple Pay, Google Pay, and multiple credit cards such as Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, and JCB. The venue appears to be designed for a casual, accessible golf experience with a focus on convenience and modern payment options. While specific details about technology, pricing, and amenities are not provided, the presence of a dedicated website and secure checkout suggests a professional operation aimed at providing a reliable indoor golf experience for players of all levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient online booking and secure payment processing
Multiple payment options including digital wallets and major credit cards
Accessible environment suitable for both casual and serious golfers

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site, but you can bring your own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue has its own kitchen and full bar service.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on simulator usage and group size, but typically ranges from 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and offers a kid-friendly atmosphere suitable for junior golfers.
